name: Sambal (Chilli Paste)
recipeInstructions:
Sambal is to Indonesian cuisine what salsa is to Mexican cooking: a fiery hot condiment served at every meal.
In a blender or food processor, combine the chilies, garlic, onion, sugar, lemon juice, water, and salt. Process until the onions are finely minced.
Pour the mixture into a 1 to 2 quart pan. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until it reduces to about 1/2 cup (about 10 minutes).
Serve at room temperature. Makes about 1/2 cup.
